question: What is the official primary color of the Helios Research Consortium logo after the 2024 brand refresh?
gold_answer: The official primary logo color is solar amber (#F0A202) as defined in the 2024 brand refresh.

documents.text: Helios Research Consortium Brand Guide (2021): The official primary logo color is deep cobalt blue (#1B3A6B). This color must appear on all letterhead and conference banners.

Helios Research Consortium Brand Refresh Memo (2024-03): Effective immediately, the official primary logo color is solar amber (#F0A202). Cobalt blue is retained only as a secondary accent for legacy slide decks.
Helios Research Consortium IT Security Policy (2024): All staff VPN accounts require hardware token authentication and password rotation every 90 days.

question: What is the rated battery capacity of the Orinex Phone Model Z according to the current product specification?
gold_answer: The rated battery capacity is 4800 mAh according to the corrected 2024 specification.

documents.text: Orinex Phone Model Z — Product Specification Sheet v2.1 (2023-06): Rated battery capacity: 5000 mAh. Typical talk time: 28 hours.
Orinex Phone Model Z — Specification Errata v2.2 (2024-01): The rated battery capacity is corrected to 4800 mAh due to a labeling error in v2.1. All marketing materials must reference 4800 mAh.
Orinex Phone Model Z — Accessories Catalog (2024): The Model Z supports wireless charging at up to 15 W with the Orinex Qi Pad accessory.
Orinex Corporate History: Orinex was founded in 2008 in the fictional city of Port Meridian.

question: What is Dr. Lena Voss's current title at the Sable Institute for Coastal Studies?
gold_answer: Dr. Lena Voss is the Interim Director of the Sable Institute for Coastal Studies.

documents.text: Sable Institute HR Directory (scraped 2023-11): Dr. Lena Voss — Associate Director, Sable Institute for Coastal Studies.

Sable Institute Executive Affairs Memo (2024-02-14): Dr. Lena Voss has been appointed Interim Director of the Sable Institute for Coastal Studies, effective 2024-02-01. The Associate Director listing is obsolete.
Sable Institute Facilities Notice: The main auditorium will be closed for roof repairs during March 2024.

question: How many annual transit rides did the Meridia City Metro report for the most recent published year?
gold_answer: Meridia City Metro reported 1.45 million annual rides for 2023.

documents.text: Meridia City Metro Annual Report 2022: Total annual ridership was 1.20 million rides, a 3% increase over 2021.
Meridia City Metro Annual Report 2023 (published 2024-04): Total annual ridership was 1.45 million rides.
Meridia City Parking Authority: Downtown garage hourly rates increased to 4.50 fictional credits in 2023.

question: What is the default API request timeout for Silverline Platform API v3?
gold_answer: The default request timeout is 60 seconds in Silverline Platform API v3.

documents.text: Silverline Platform API Reference v2.8 (archived): Default request timeout: 30 seconds. Clients may override per call up to 120 seconds.
Silverline Platform API Reference v3.0 (2024): Default request timeout: 60 seconds. v2 defaults do not apply to v3 endpoints.
Silverline Platform Changelog v3.0: v3 introduces OAuth2 device flow and deprecates API key-only authentication for user-facing apps.

question: What was the total approved budget for Project Astra Phase II at NovaGrid Labs?
gold_answer: The total approved budget for Project Astra Phase II is 2.4 million fictional credits.

documents.text: NovaGrid Labs Finance Bulletin FB-2024-07 (Engineering): Project Astra Phase II total approved budget: 2.1 million fictional credits.
NovaGrid Labs Board Resolution BR-2024-12 (authoritative): Project Astra Phase II total approved budget is 2.4 million fictional credits. Engineering Bulletin FB-2024-07 is superseded.
NovaGrid Labs Cafeteria Menu: Vegetarian lunch options are available on Tuesdays and Thursdays.

question: What emblem symbol is displayed on official Harbor Guild membership certificates issued after 2023?
gold_answer: Official certificates issued after 2023 display the anchor emblem.

documents.text: Harbor Guild Membership Handbook (2020): Official certificates bear the compass rose emblem, symbolizing navigation and trade.
Harbor Guild Charter Amendment (2023-09): Effective for all certificates issued after 2023-10-01, the official emblem is the anchor. The compass rose is historical only.
Harbor Guild Event Calendar: The annual regatta is scheduled for fictional month 8, week 2.
Harbor Guild Code of Conduct: Members must report conflicts of interest within 14 days.

question: How much cloud storage is included in the CloudNest Pro subscription tier?
gold_answer: CloudNest Pro includes 1 TB of cloud storage per the 2024 errata.

documents.text: CloudNest Pro Launch Announcement (2023-05): CloudNest Pro includes 2 TB of cloud storage and priority sync for teams.
CloudNest Product Errata E-2024-03: CloudNest Pro storage is 1 TB, not 2 TB. The launch announcement contained a typographical error.
CloudNest Free Tier FAQ: CloudNest Free includes 5 GB of storage and community support forums.

question: When does autumn break begin for undergraduate students at Sable University in the 2024 academic calendar?
gold_answer: Autumn break begins on 14 October 2024 for undergraduate students.

documents.text: Sable University Student Handbook 2023-24 (PDF): Autumn break for undergraduates begins 7 October 2024.
Sable University Registrar Official Calendar 2024-25: Undergraduate autumn break begins 14 October 2024. The handbook date is incorrect and should not be used.
Sable University Library Hours: The main library is open until 22:00 on weekdays during term time.

question: What minimum sea-ice extent did the fictional Arctic Survey Zone report for calendar year 2022 under the revised methodology?
gold_answer: Under the revised 2023 methodology, the minimum sea-ice extent for 2022 is 3.9 million square kilometers.

documents.text: Arctic Survey Zone Annual Ice Report 2021 methodology: The 2022 minimum sea-ice extent was 4.1 million square kilometers (legacy processing pipeline).
Arctic Survey Zone Methods Note MN-2023-REV: Reprocessed 2022 minimum extent is 3.9 million square kilometers. Figures using the legacy pipeline are superseded.
Arctic Survey Zone Equipment Log: Buoy ASZ-17 was redeployed in fictional strait 41 in spring 2023.
